titleStmt.title: SII 39.47: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 47. (A.R. No. 47 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA: RIGHT OF ENTRANCE NARASA NAYAKA-ŚAKA 142(4) (1502 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription registers the gift of dēvadāṉa village of Kiḻmaṇanallūr together with Embalkuṟichchi in Tenkōnāḍu, for making offering to the temple of Tirukkōḷakkuḍi-āṇḍa-nāyaṇār in Ponnamarāpatināḍu for the Tiruvōṇam festival. Tammaya-nāyaka, the agent of Tipparasa-uḍaiyar made the gift for the latter's merit. The inscription mentions that Narasanāyaka was governing the country on behalf of Narasinga Bhujabalarāja Danmarāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī manmakāmaṇṭalecuraṉ Arirāya vipāṭaṉ
pāṣakku tappuva Irāyirakaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭa nāṭu koṇṭu koṇ
ṭanāṭu koṭātavaṉ metiṉi mīcurakaṇṭaṉ kaṭṭāri cā
ḷuvaṉ tulukkarkaḷ vipāṭaṉ pūruvatakṣaṇa pacci
mu Uttira camuttirāpati śrī rimatu naraciṅka pucapala Irāyar
taṉmarāyaṟku naracānāyakkar piritirācciyam paṇṇi
Aruḷāniṉṟa cakārttam 1000 4 100 2 10 4 Itaṉmel tuntumi va
rucattu Uttarāyaṇattu catuṟutattiyum kumpa nāyaṟṟu
Amara pakṣattu catuṟuttiyum vikirapati vāramum
viti pātatḍyakamum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ ciṟimatu tipparaca
Uṭaiyar kāriyattukku karttarāṉa tammaiya nāyakkar
poṉṉamarāpati nāṭṭu tirukkoḷakkuṭi tirukkoḷakkuṭi
Āṇṭa nayiṉārkku Uṣarpūcai Amutu ceyyum kaṭṭaḷai
kku Ayyaṉtatippara Uṭaiyarkku taṉmamāka Iṟṟai nāḷ
civalāttarai puṇṇiya kālattil tevatāṉamā
kaviṭṭa teṉ koṉāṭṭu kiḻmaṇanallūr kiṟā
mam Oṉṟum nāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa Empal
kuṟicci nañcai puñcai puṟakkaṭi Uḷpaṭa camuttappiṟāttiyaḷum
carvamāṉiyamāka cantaṟātittavarai cella tevatā
ṉamāka viṭṭa Aḷavukku Immariyātile nayiṉār
tirukkoḷakkuṭi Āṇṭa nayiṉāṟku Ittak
kiḻmaṇanallūr kiramum nāṉkellaik
kuḷpaṭṭa Ental kuṟicci nañcai puñcai puṟakkaṭi
Uḷpaṭa camutta piṟattiyamum tevatāṉamāka caṟuva
mānipam Āka cantaṟātittavaṟ cella Aṉupavittuk koḷḷavum
Intap paṟṟukaḷil pūṟuvattiluṇṭāṉa tevatāṉa
m tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam pirāmaṇar mānipam niṅkalāka
Anupavittuk koḷḷavum dānapālanyormmadānatśre
yer ndavālandānnyassammavāpoprotivālanadi mayadamle
yā nūyar Uvāyoha reti nerāṣaṣdhaṣṣasaharā viṣā
Digital edition of SII 39.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
